templates.title: Run shell command — eksekusi perintah shell
templates.description: Jalankan perintah shell, tangkap stdout/stderr/exit code.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(cmd, timeout={{default_timeout}}, cwd=None, env=None):
    """Jalankan shell command, return (stdout, stderr, returncode)."""
    result = subprocess.run(
        cmd,
        shell=True,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        timeout=timeout,
        cwd=cwd,
        env=env,
    )
    return result.stdout, result.stderr, result.returncode

templates.title: Background worker — jalankan task di background thread
templates.description: Decorator untuk menjalankan fungsi di background thread (daemon).
